data.next_action: Inspect the result and re-open the project or search memory if you need the updated guided state.

result.use_when: Ranked trading outcome with selection_score or minimal trading metrics.

record.title: Strategy result
record.summary: Run completed with positive net_pnl and acceptable drawdown.

training_result.use_when: Model-stage metrics such as accuracy, roc_auc, f1, or logloss.

record.title: Directional classifier result
record.summary: Validation ROC AUC improved over the previous baseline.

milestone.use_when: Operational or analytics checkpoint without trading metrics.

record.title: Operational checkpoint
record.summary: Validated payload shape and queued the next build step.

checkpoint.use_when: Timeline checkpoint linked to existing nodes without treating it as a ranked result.

record.title: Checkpoint event
record.summary: Recorded one timeline checkpoint without trading metrics.

next_recommended_actions: Re-open the project when you need the current guided state after this write.
Search the project later when this record should be found by keywords rather than direct ids.
